gt_sql: SELECT T2.DisplayName, T2.Location FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.Id = 183 ORDER BY T1.LastEditDate DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT u.DisplayName, u.Location
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE p.Id = 183;
question: Identify the display name and location of the user, who was the last to edit the post with ID 183.
